name: Voice Command Processor
description: Process natural language voice commands into structured action plans using Claude AI and post the results to Slack. Adapted from the Siri AI Agent template for text-based command processing.

source.originalName: Siri AI agent: Apple Shortcuts powered voice template

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the action plan

command.description: Natural language command to process (e.g. 'Schedule a team lunch for Friday and send invites to the marketing team')

userContext.description: Additional context about the user or environment (e.g. timezone, role, preferences)
